reported_issue: Operator reported weight variation on tablet press during routine production run 1.
diagnosis: Technician reproduced the symptom and identified feeder paddle buildup as the leading cause.
actions_taken: Made equipment safe and reviewed recent alarms.
Cleaned the feeder and verified fill depth.
Ran verification checks before release to production.
technician_notes: Demo work order generated offline for retrieval testing.
